## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

<!-- Example: Closes #95 -->

## Validation

List the checks you ran and outcomes.

```bash
pnpm typecheck
pnpm lint
pnpm test:unit
pnpm test:integration
```

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused on one issue / related change set.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior, commands, APIs, or workflows changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] Commits are signed off for DCO (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] This PR does **not** disclose a security vulnerability in public. (Use private advisories instead.)
